_comment: Single source of truth for the Coveo Sitemap source's URL filtering. Read by scripts/widen_source.sh (applies to the source) and by tests/ (used to recompute the expected indexed set independently from the sitemap, for parity testing).

narrow.description: 1 Pokemon (Bulbasaur) — fast iteration during scraping config changes

spot-check.description: 8 diverse Pokemon — edge-case sweep (hyphenated names, single/dual type, multiple generations, legendary, hisuian variant)

all.description: All ~1,025 Pokemon — production scope. Inclusion regex is permissive; the exclusion list removes list/aggregate/non-Pokemon pages that would otherwise match.
